ioticspellbooks.entry.interop.irons_spel: New Iron's spells:$(br)$(li)$(l)Hex Grid$() - opens hex casting grid.
Reads Iron's spell from the scroll in my hand. Costs one shard.
Makes the entity cast the given spell. Costs the mana required for spell, plus 1 dust per 50 mana, but not more than 1 charged crystal.

Puts the spell on cooldown for me. Fails if I can't cast spell, e.g. if it's an unknown eldritch spell, or it's on cooldown.$(br2)All living entities are capable of casting Iron's spells, but only spellcasters can properly target and maintain most spells.
Conjures spellbook at the given position. Spellbook is a spellcaster entity, capable of casting Iron's spells. Costs one shard.
Directs conjured spellbook in the direction of the vector, or locks it onto given entity. Spellbook will automatically rotate to follow target entity. Costs one dust.
Destroys conjured spellbook. Costs one thousandth of a dust if spellbook was conjured by me, and one charged crystal otherwise.
